title: Bothriochloa grahamii
taxonomy: Bothriochloa grahamii is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Andropogoneae. The genus Bothriochloa is part of the tribe Andropogoneae, and it is closely related to the genus Dichanthium. Bothriochloa grahamii is native to Western Australia. Its classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the family Poaceae.
